faq.question: What is Pikonik and how does it work?
faq.answer: Pikonik is a Billing and POS (Point of Sale) app designed for small businesses to manage sales, expenses, inventory, and complete cafe order management.

faq.question: Who can use Pikonik?
faq.answer: Pikonik is suitable for cafes and restaurants, small retail stores that do not require barcode scanners, boutique stores, crafts businesses, and service businesses.

faq.question: Which devices support Pikonik?
faq.answer: Pikonik is supported on Android and iOS devices.

faq.question: Does Pikonik work offline?
faq.answer: No, Pikonik runs online. An active internet connection is required to use all features smoothly and keep data synced in real time.

faq.question: Is there 24x7 helpline support?
faq.answer: Yes, Pikonik provides 24x7 helpline support.

faq.question: What is the difference between Normal POS and Cafe Management?
faq.answer: Normal POS is designed for quick transactions such as GST or non-GST billing, inventory monitoring, payment collection, and receipt printing or sharing. Cafe Management is built for restaurants and cafes with table, dine-in, takeaway, KOT, kitchen display, live order status, table management, billing summary, and menu inventory.

faq.question: What should I do if the app is not working properly?
faq.answer: 1.Check your internet connection 2.Close and reopen the app 3.Make sure you are using the latest version 4.Restart your device and log out and log back in 5.If the issue still persists, contact Pikonik customer care and provide the error message, screenshots, or steps where the issue occurs.

faq.question: How do I invite new managers or owners?
faq.answer: Log in to the shop or business device using the business or manager email ID. Go to Company under Manage Users, click the plus icon, enter the manager email address, assign Manager or Owner role, grant required permissions, and send the invitation.

faq.question: How does a new manager log in?
faq.answer: A new manager should use a device authorized by the owner, log in with the email ID selected for manager access, and then start updating sales using the app.

faq.question: Can I have more than one manager?
faq.answer: Yes, you can have more than one manager in Pikonik.

faq.question: How do I add new inventory in Normal POS?
faq.answer: In Normal POS, go to Manage Inventory, click the plus icon at the bottom right, insert the item name, category, and selling price, then turn on unlimited quantity or enter the available quantity.

faq.question: How do I add new inventory in Cafe Management?
faq.answer: In Cafe Management, go to Manage Inventory, click the plus icon at the bottom right, insert the item name, select the menu type such as Kitchen, Cafe, or Bar, enter the selling price, then turn on unlimited quantity or enter the available quantity.

faq.question: How do I create a bill in Normal POS?
faq.answer: Tap Income or the Up Arrow, select the items to add to the bill, optionally use the Gear icon to enable Customer Info, Tax, Auto Receipt, or Inventory Check, choose the payment method, and generate the bill for printing or sharing.

faq.question: How do I create a bill in Cafe Management?
faq.answer: Tap Income or the Up Arrow, tap Take Order, select a table, add menu items from Kitchen, Cafe, or Bar, tap the Cart icon to review and place the order, generate a KOT for the kitchen, then proceed to payment and generate the final bill.

faq.question: How do I display the Order Status Board on an external monitor?
faq.answer: On the owner device, go to Preferences, select Public Display Board, copy the Display URL, open a browser on the external monitor, paste the URL, log in with your account, and the Order Status Board will display and update in real time.

faq.question: Can I accept UPI payments?
faq.answer: Yes, you can integrate your UPI ID and accept digital payments directly through the app. Open the app, add or select items, enter quantity and price, generate the bill, and print or share it with the customer.

faq.question: How do I add my expenses?
faq.answer: Click Expenses or the Down Arrow, enter the item, amount spent, and remarks, then select the date and payment mode and submit the expense.

faq.question: Can I edit orders after they have been placed?
faq.answer: Yes, edits can be made before the payment is completed.

faq.question: How do I view my summary?
faq.answer: Go to Dashboard or Transaction section, select Summary or Top 5 Sales, open the transactions, select Income or Expense summary, choose your required date range, and generate the summary. You can also view or download summaries for normal bills and cafe bills.

faq.question: Can I download my receipt and summary?
faq.answer: Go to Dashboard or Transactions, select the receipt, click the three dots, and choose Share Image or Print.

faq.question: Can I send bills to customers?
faq.answer: Yes, you can share receipts via WhatsApp or generate printable bills.

faq.question: Does Pikonik support printing?
faq.answer: Yes, Pikonik supports thermal printers, including Bluetooth printers and ESC/POS printers.

faq.question: Does Pikonik track income and expenses?
faq.answer: Yes, the app updates income, expenses, and profit in real time.

faq.question: Can I analyze my business performance?
faq.answer: Yes, Pikonik provides insights to help understand sales, customers, and business growth.

faq.question: Where do I set my table number?
faq.answer: Go to Preferences and set the table number, for example greater than 100.

faq.question: What is QR Print Mode?
faq.answer: QR Print Mode allows you to print a QR code on the bill or receipt. It generates a QR code for each transaction and prints it with the receipt so customers can scan and pay through UPI or digital wallets.

faq.question: What is the difference between Native Mode and Raster Mode?
faq.answer: Native Mode uses the printer's built-in commands, is faster and more efficient, and works best for text-based receipts. Raster Mode converts content into an image before printing, is slightly slower, and is better for QR codes, logos, graphics, and detailed prints.

faq.question: Where do I change my company name?
faq.answer: On the owner device, go to Company, add or update your Business Information, and save the changes.

faq.question: Can I customize receipts?
faq.answer: Yes. Go to Preferences, select Receipt Branding, click Upload Logo, choose your logo file from your local device, and save the changes.

faq.question: Can multiple users access the app?
faq.answer: Yes, multiple users can access the app using role-based access and assigned permissions, such as manager roles.

faq.question: Why is my inventory not matching?
faq.answer: Make sure all sales are recorded correctly, sync data across users, and check your inventory settings.

faq.question: Why is my printer not connecting?
faq.answer: Turn on Bluetooth, pair the printer properly, and use a compatible thermal printer.

faq.question: Is my data safe?
faq.answer: Yes, your data is safe and protected. Pikonik keeps data safe through secure storage, encryption, access control for authorized users, and regular backups to help prevent data loss.

faq.question: Is data encrypted during transfer?
faq.answer: Yes, your data is encrypted during transfer using secure encryption protocols such as HTTPS/SSL. This helps prevent unauthorized access or interception and ensures safe communication between your device and the server.

faq.question: Can I delete my data?
faq.answer: Yes, users can request data deletion.

faq.question: How often should I back up my billing data?
keywords: how often should i back up my billing data?
how often should i back up my billing data help
how often should i back up my billing data guide
faq.answer: PIKONIK stores data securely in the cloud. However, it is recommended to review and export important reports weekly or monthly for additional records.

what are the best practices for managing daily sales records help
what are the best practices for managing daily sales records guide
faq.answer: Close sales at the end of each day, verify cash collections, reconcile digital payments, and review daily sales reports.

faq.question: Should I use GST billing or non-GST billing for my business?
keywords: should i use gst billing or non-gst billing for my business?
should i use gst billing or non-gst billing for my business help
should i use gst billing or non-gst billing for my business guide
faq.answer: Use GST billing if your business is GST-registered. Use non-GST billing if GST compliance is not required.
